mapper.select: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM products WHERE model_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{modelNumber}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM products WHERE material_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialNumber}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM products WHERE hot_stamping_paper_type = #{hotStampingPaperType} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR model_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR material_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR hot_stamping_paper_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR descirption LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR fengdu LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR paizi LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR gaishu LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (name, model_number, material_number, hot_stamping_paper_type, descirption, fengdu, paizi, gaishu, danwei, is_changyong, is_jiehuo, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{modelNumber}, #{materialNumber}, #{hotStampingPaperType}, #{descirption}, #{fengdu}, #{paizi}, #{gaishu}, #{danwei}, #{isChangyong}, #{isJiehuo}, COALESCE(#{status}, '可用'))
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET name = #{name}, model_number = #{modelNumber}, material_number = #{materialNumber}, hot_stamping_paper_type = #{hotStampingPaperType}, descirption = #{descirption}, fengdu = #{fengdu}, paizi = #{paizi}, gaishu = #{gaishu}, danwei = #{danwei}, is_changyong = #{isChangyong}, is_jiehuo = #{isJiehuo}, status = COALESCE(#{status}, '可用') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT hot_stamping_paper_type FROM products WHERE hot_stamping_paper_type IS NOT NULL AND hot_stamping_paper_type != '' ORDER BY hot_stamping_paper_type
SELECT DISTINCT danwei FROM products WHERE danwei IS NOT NULL AND danwei != '' ORDER BY danwei
SELECT DISTINCT paizi FROM products WHERE paizi IS NOT NULL AND paizi != '' ORDER BY paizi
SELECT DISTINCT fengdu FROM products WHERE fengdu IS NOT NULL AND fengdu != '' ORDER BY fengdu
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM products WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' ORDER BY name
SELECT * FROM products WHERE model_number = #{modelNumber} AND name = #{name}
